prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别为5166→2577→4482→1722→1660名。2021–2022年大幅前移（5166→2577），2023年回退至4482，2024年大幅前移至1722，2025年基本持平于1660名。近两年位次稳定在1600–1700区间，2025年基准约1660名；该校在贵州省理科/物理类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年44人、2023年48人、2024年46人、2025年46人；2026年计划61人，较2025年扩招15人（增幅约32.6%），扩招幅度显著，预计竞争有所缓解，位次数字可能后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 南开大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年位列第21名（Top20），近年排名稳定在第20–23名之间，属于国内顶尖高校层次；2026年声誉评价为「明显负面」，涉及生科院院长论文数据造假被免职、多位教师被实名举报等学术不端事件，可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定负面影响；抖音热度为「较热」（总排名第36），关注度中等；2022年曾在河南出现严重断档，对报考心理有滞后影响；第五轮学科评估A-及以上共14个学科，其中化学、工商管理、应用经济学、数学为A+，世界史、中国史、中国语言文学、政治学、物理学、理论经济学、生物学、统计学、马克思主义理论为A，环境科学与工程为A-，学科实力雄厚，对考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2026年贵州省物理类考生估算约20.84万人，较2025年20.72万人略有增加。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合以上因素：2025年基准位次1660名，2026年大幅扩招约32.6%是影响位次的最关键因素，按供需弹性计算位次应后移至约1985名；学校层次极高（985/软科第21名）对位次有支撑作用，但2026年声誉负面（学术不端事件）可能使部分考生犹豫，略有推高位次数字的效应；贵州省物理类考生人数微增。综合权衡后，预测2026年最低位次约2000名，区间1772–2228名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were 5166→2577→4482→1722→1660 respectively. From 2021 to 2022, there was a significant forward shift (5166→2577), in 2023 it retreated to 4482, in 2024 it moved forward significantly to 1722, and in 2025 it remained roughly stable at 1660. In the past two years, rankings have stabilized in the 1600–1700 range, with a baseline of approximately 1660 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Guizhou Province for science/physics category: 32 students in 2021, 44 in 2022, 48 in 2023, 46 in 2024, 46 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 61 students, an increase of 15 students (approximately 32.6%) compared to 2025. The expansion is significant, and competition is expected to ease somewhat, with rankings likely to shift backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Nankai University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks 21st (Top 20), with stable rankings between 20th and 23rd in recent years, placing it among the top domestic universities. The 2026 reputation evaluation is 'clearly negative', involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication by the dean of the School of Life Sciences leading to dismissal, and multiple teachers being publicly reported, which may have a certain negative impact on some candidates' application psychology. Douyin popularity is 'relatively hot' (overall ranking 36th), with moderate attention. In 2022, there was a severe enrollment gap in Henan, which has a lagging effect on application psychology. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 14 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Chemistry, Business Administration, Applied Economics, and Mathematics; A in World History, Chinese History, Chinese Language and Literature, Political Science, Physics, Theoretical Economics, Biology, Statistics, and Marxist Theory; and A- in Environmental Science and Engineering. The disciplinary strength is robust, strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2026, the estimated number of physics category candidates in Guizhou Province is approximately 208,400, a slight increase from 207,200 in 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the above factors: the baseline ranking in 2025 is 1660, and the significant expansion of approximately 32.6% in 2026 is the most critical factor affecting rankings. Based on supply-demand elasticity, the ranking should shift backward to about 1985. The university's very high level (985/Soft Science 21st) supports the ranking, but the negative reputation in 2026 (academic misconduct incidents) may cause some candidates to hesitate, slightly pushing the ranking number higher. The number of physics category candidates in Guizhou Province has increased slightly. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 2000, with a range of 1772–2228.
